message:
Harden FCALL function name validation and fix FUNCTION RESTORE policy handling

Three changes to improve correctness and security:

1. fr-command: Add input validation to fcall_cmd that rejects function
   names containing non-alphanumeric/underscore characters, preventing
   potential Lua code injection when constructing wrapper scripts.

2. fr-command: Remove dead binding (let _ = &func_entries) and remove
   stale READONLY/READWRITE entries from the command table (these are
   handled via cluster mode, not the main command dispatch).

3. fr-store: Fix FUNCTION RESTORE to reject unknown policies upfront
   with a clear error, and remove an incorrect early-continue that
   silently skipped library restoration when neither replace nor append
   was set (which was unreachable after the new validation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
